title: Brazilian Joy
content: I spent time in Brazil during Carnival once. The Brazilians taught me something profound - alegria, they call it. Joy as a practice, not just a feeling. Even when times are hard, you can choose to practice joy.
ssml_content: I spent time in Brazil during Carnival once. <break time="200ms"/>The Brazilians taught me something profound - alegria, they call it. Joy as a practice, not just a feeling. <break time="200ms"/>Even when times are hard, you can choose to practice joy.
teaching_point: Joy is a practice, not just a feeling
